description: Roleplay prompt: Star-Marshal: Raycast Tactical Shooter
template: Game Concept: A top-down tactical shooter where you play as a "Star-Marshal" clearing a space station of rogue drones. The game emphasizes precise hit-scan combat and dynamic lighting.Technical Prompt:Develop a top-down shooter mechanic. Use THREE.Raycaster for instant-hit weapon fire. Implement a muzzle flash light that flickers for 0.05s upon firing.
